:''See also: [[Locations#List_of_Locations|List of Locations]]'' 
[[File:ShopsMenu4Choices.png|thumb]][[Travel with Sass]], also called the '''Travel Agency''', is a [[Shops|shop]]<ref>Shops are located on the third tab:{{Clear}}[[File:FinchShopBarnew.jpg|thumb|left]]{{Clear}}</ref> where you can travel to different [[Locations]]. The store unlocks when your birb becomes a [[Stages of Growth|Child]] (when you have completed 22 full-[[energy]] days.)

Your very first flight will be free. If you want to travel after that, the regular price is 300 [[Rainbow Stones]] for each trip. (Travel to [[Finchie Forest]] is only 200 stones.) Flights are one-way; you can't return to a location (such as [[Finchie Forest]]) until that flight is offered in the shop.  

{{Clear}}[[File:TravelAgencyExamples.jpg|thumb]]You can only travel to the destinations offered for sale that day, which are a random mix. The shop cannot be refreshed with new locations.

==Travel is an Adventure== 
Traveling counts as an [[Adventuring|Adventure]] and has the same time length. The only difference during the trip is the lack of walking scenery. Like an Adventure, you must have full energy to start your flight. You will get a new [[Discoveries|Discovery]] at your new location when your flight is over.

If you buy a ticket after you have completed an adventure for the day, the trip will start the next day as soon as you have full energy. Whenever you buy a ticket, you are committed.

==Destinations==
[[File:TravelwithSassDestinationTaipei.png|thumb]]If you want a specific location, you have to wait until it rotates into the shop. To buy a ticket, click the location, and click the button at the bottom of the popup: "Fly to (xyz location)!" 

You can examine your progress at each location offered without buying a ticket. Both the flight tickets and the popups show the percentage you have completed, and the popup shows how many of the special discoveries you have found so far. It also shows four unique clothing items and four birbhouse decorations. These are only offered in [[Mr. Prickles' Shop]] and [[Finkea Furnishings]] while you are at the location. Your birb is shown wearing an example of the location-specific clothing.  

=== Logbook ===
[[File:LocationLogbook.png|thumb]]
You can gain a general overlook over all locations you have visited in the notes menu. It also shows you how many locations there are currently. You can filter between all locations and seasonal ones. This contains limited-time story locations, such as [[Midnight Manor]]. When you click on one of the locations you already visited you will see all the discoveries which are tied specifically to that location. That does not only include the special like and dislike discoveries for each location but also normal ones which you can only look at in your logbook. The locations as well as the discoveries you havent traveled/discovered yet are marked with question marks. The progress on each location is shown in %. Once you have 100% and fully discovered the location, the location picture turns much more colorful. You will continue to make non-location discoveries every day you are there!

=== Free choices===
Free members have three destination choices in the shop every day.<ref>Formerly, Free players had only two choices per day.</ref>

=== Finch Plus choices===
[[Finch Plus]] members who support the developers have nine choices in the shop every day.<ref>The former 50% sale slot was retired.</ref> 

==Effect on other shops== 
The clothing shop and furniture shop offerings change when you fly, but with planning you can visit the shops in both locations that day. If you already bought a ticket but have not reached full energy, you can shop where you are. After your trip, the new location shop, with its own location-specific item slot, is ready for you.
